Author: swills Date: Thu Jan 2 21:24:19 2014 New Revision: 338504 URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338504 Log: - Update to 1.9.3 - Fix some html issues PR: ports/183096 Submitted by: clutton Added: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/files/patch-download.html (contents, props changed) head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/files/patch-introduction.html (contents, props changed) head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/files/patch-packages.html (contents, props changed) head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/files/patch-toc.html (contents, props changed) Deleted: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/files/patch-install.rb Modified: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/Makefile (contents, props changed) head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/distinfo (contents, props changed) head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/pkg-descr head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/pkg-plist (contents, props changed) Modified: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/Makefile ============================================================================== --- head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/Makefile Thu Jan 2 21:09:53 2014 (r338503) +++ head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/Makefile Thu Jan 2 21:24:19 2014 (r338504) @@ -2,11 +2,13 @@ # $FreeBSD$ PORTNAME= stdlib -PORTVERSION= 0.10.1 -CATEGORIES= lang ruby -MASTER_SITES= http://www.ruby-doc.org/download/stdlib/ +PORTVERSION= 1.9.3 + PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${RUBY_PKGNAMEPREFIX}doc- -DISTNAME= ruby-doc-${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION} +CATEGORIES= ruby lang docs + +DISTNAME= ruby_${PORTVERSION:S/./_/g}_${PORTNAME}_rdocs +MASTER_SITES= http://www.ruby-doc.org/downloads/ EXTRACT_SUFX= .tgz DIST_SUBDIR= ruby @@ -16,25 +18,10 @@ COMMENT= Documentation for the Ruby lang USE_RUBY= yes NO_BUILD= yes -NO_STAGE= yes -.include +WRKSRC= ${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME:S/_rdocs//} do-install: - ${MKDIR} ${RUBY_DOCDIR}/ - @(cd ${WRKSRC} && \ - ${RUBY} install.rb --force --doc-base ${RUBY_DOCDIR}/) - -plist: - truncate -s0 pkg-plist - - @${FIND} -ds ${RUBY_MODDOCDIR}/ ! -type d | \ - ${SED} 's,^${RUBY_MODDOCDIR},%%RUBY_MODDOCDIR%%,' \ - >> pkg-plist - - @${FIND} -ds ${RUBY_MODDOCDIR}/ -type d | ${SORT} -r | ${SED} -E -e \ - 's,^${RUBY_MODDOCDIR}(.*),@dirrm %%RUBY_MODDOCDIR%%\1,' \ - >> pkg-plist - - @${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrmtry %%RUBY_DOCDIR%%" >> pkg-plist + @${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${RUBY_DOCDIR} + @${CP} -R ${WRKSRC} ${STAGEDIR}${RUBY_DOCDIR}/${PORTNAME} -.include +.include Modified: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/distinfo ============================================================================== --- head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/distinfo Thu Jan 2 21:09:53 2014 (r338503) +++ head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/distinfo Thu Jan 2 21:24:19 2014 (r338504) @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@ -SHA256 (ruby/ruby-doc-stdlib-0.10.1.tgz) Modified: head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/pkg-descr ============================================================================== --- head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/pkg-descr Thu Jan 2 21:09:53 2014 (r338503) +++ head/lang/ruby-doc-stdlib/pkg-descr Thu Jan 2 21:24:19 2014 (r338504) @@ -1,13 +1,3 @@ -Welcome to the Ruby Standard Library Documentation collection, -brought to you by the ruby-doc project. -Whether you are browsing online or offline, -we hope that your use of Ruby's standard library will become more productive -as a result of this effort. - -ruby-doc is a project dedicated to creating and collecting -documentation on Ruby. -You can find collections of articles and other resources at the website. - stdlib-doc is a RubyForge project that converts Ruby source code into this documentation you are looking at. It also tracks the status of the documentation effort.
